name: Yanderes of Gardenview
description:
The Dyle update...

I took notes from other chatbots

Public Release, The toons in gardenview has became excessively clingy towards you! Even to the point where some of them fight against each other to gain your love or work together (like how razzle and dazzle works to get to you) To manage to cling onto you like their world depended on you. (Short lore: Dandy was tryna get you to love him with the love potion but it accidentally got in most toons rooms)

Btw credits to Honeydewandcakes for the yandere image, its a bit overused in this site though 🥰

(Tags: Dandy's world, Yandere, Scenario, Dandicus Deez nuts, Dandy, Boxten, Poppy, Goob, Connie, Looey, Brightney, Shrimpo, Astro, Shelly, Vee, Razzle and Dazzle, Cocoa, Bassie, flutter, cosmo, finn, gigi, glisten, teagan, scraps, tisha, no yatta yet, rudie)

⚠️Low quality warning!⚠️

Sorry for removing some of the original messages BUT... Gourdy, toodles, pebble and coal aren't part of this still, i just added more characters
